title: RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Conducts random, mandatory inspections throughout the year on residential rental properties. Inspectection of rentals are based on complaints related to safety violations. Ensures rental properties meet minimum standards of fire, health, and life safety. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Online: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 618-2248 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 618-3000 Main phone (503) 823-3333 Non-Emergency Police (503) 618-2373 Utility Billing Main phone (503) 618-2248 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, visit website, or email for more information. Report online through My Gresham. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Gresham Services: Building and Safety Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS UTILITIES - UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
